Prevention: Use disease-resistant Medicinal Herbs (Tulsi, Ashwagandha) varieties, crop rotation, and proper field sanitation.
RecoveryTime: 10-20 days depending on severity and treatment.
processed_symptoms: visible sign of fungal disease on medicinal herb ( tulsi , ashwagandha ) , such a spot , wilt , or discoloration .
